caption: A gathering of men is seated in an assembly hall with tiered wooden seating and green upholstery. The men are dressed in a mix of traditional and formal attire, including white shirts, dark vests, and light-colored kurtas. In the foreground, a man in a white shirt gestures with his hands while speaking, seated next to a man in a dark vest who looks toward him. Behind them, other men are seen listening or looking in various directions; one man in a white shirt rests his chin on his hand, while another in a light-colored vest sits further back. The scene remains static in terms of composition, with only minor shifts in the men's facial expressions and hand gestures as they react to the proceedings. No on-screen text, logos, or specialized equipment are visible in the frames.
